untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Johansen cointegration test (statistical test not available as indicator), portfolio construction from cointegrated stock universe (requires multi-asset screening logic), and spread-based mean reversion triggers (cointegration residual/spread not in allowed indicators). These require custom statistical computation outside standard indicator library.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires: (1) cointegration testing framework between multiple assets and SPY, (2) dynamic portfolio construction based on cointegration results, and (3) spread/residual monitoring from a cointegration model. None of these are expressible using the allowed indicators (which are single-asset technical indicators only). The signal needs a custom cointegration module in the backtest engine rather than a rule-based condition set. A simplified proxy using log_returns deviation was provided but does not capture the intended cointegration logic.
